2009May 17, 2009

🇨🇦 Parksville, Canada

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Parksville, Canada, May 17, 2009 -- May 22, 2009

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2009-05-parksville-british-columbia-canada

21 Resolutions

785Plenary
Approve PWI on Future SC 4 Architecture
SC 4 approves a PWI on “Future SC 4 Architecture” to: * Explore the range of options for exploiting new technologies to support interoperability between SC 4 standards, and the work of other commit...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
784Plenary
Create Advisory Group for SC 4 Implementation Forum
SC 4 decides to create the Advisory Group “SC 4 Implementation Forum”, which will also incorporate the tasks and members of the existing Committee for Education and Outreach, which is now disbanded...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
783Plenary
Replace ISO/TC 154 liaison officer with Hiroshi Murayama
SC 4 accepts the request from WG 2 to replace Dr. Wolfgang Wilkes by Mr. Hiroshi Murayama as liaison officer to ISO/TC 154.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
782Plenary
Change title of ISO/DIS 13584-32 to OntoML
SC 4 approves the new title “Automation systems and integration -- Parts library -- Part 32: Implementation resources: OntoML: Product Ontology Markup Language“, advises SC 4 secretariat to perform...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
781Plenary
Publish Usage Guide for ISO 10303-214 as ISO 10303-5001
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 decides to publish the “Usage Guide for ISO 10303-214 for gear units” as ISO 10303-5001. The format of the document shall be edited to align with an AP. New conformance classes shal...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
780Plenary
Advance ISO/TS 22745 and ISO/TS 29002 parts to IS ballot
SC 4 approves the submission of ISO/TS 22745 parts 10, 14, 30, 35 and 40 and ISO/TS 29002 parts 4, 5, 6, 10, 20 and 31 for ballot as International Standards.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
779Plenary
Prepare FDIS documents for ISO 10303 minor revisions
SC 4 directs WG 12 to prepare FDIS documents for ISO 10303-47, 503, 504, 506, 517, 518, 519, 520, 521, and 523 and submit them to ISO for processing as minor revisions. Resolution 763 is superseded.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
778Plenary
Extend DIS submission date for ISO 10303-61
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to inform ISO/CS that the target date for the submission of 10303-61 for DIS ballot is extended to 2009-07-23, and that this part should not be automatically cancelled...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
777Plenary
Extend initiation of CD ballot for ISO 10303-241
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to inform ISO CS that SC 4 has decided to extend the initiation of the CD ballot for ISO 10303-241 until end of 2009.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
776Plenary
Approve minor revision of ISO/TS 10303-1005 for HTML formatting
SC 4 approves a minor revision of ISO/TS 10303-1005, comprising reformatting in HTML conforming to current guidelines, with the current EXPRESS.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
775Plenary
Initiate harvesting for 3D Visualization specifications
SC 4 requests its Secretariat to request the bodies responsible for each of the candidate 3D visualization formats identified in SC 4 N 2465 that have successfully passed the assessment process and...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
774Plenary
Accept report and disband 3D Visualization ad hoc group
SC 4 accepts the report SC 4 N 2465 of the 3D visualization ad hoc group, SC 4 thanks the group for its effort, and disbands the group.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
773Plenary
Define duration for CD ballots not combined with NP ballots
SC 4 resolves that any CD ballots that are not combined with NP ballots shall be 2 months, unless an extension to 3 months is requested prior to the ballot by any P-member, or at the discretion of ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
772Plenary
Appoint Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle as convener of JWG 8
SC 4 appoints Anne-Françoise Cutting-Decelle as convener of JWG 8 for a three-year term.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
771Plenary
Recognize Dr. King Yee upon his retirement
SC 4 notes with regret the retirement of Dr. King Yee from the significant positions he has held over many years within SC 4, offers its thanks for his outstanding support and wishes him health and...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
770Plenary
Re-appoint Tim King as Convenor of WG 13
SC 4 approves Tim King to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 13 for an additional period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
769Plenary
Re-appoint Keith Hunten as Convenor of WG 12
SC 4 approves Keith Hunten to serve as Convenor of its Working Group 12 for an additional period of three years.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
768Plenary
Establish internal liaison with ISO/PC 246
SC 4 accepts the request from ISO/PC 246 Anti-counterfeiting tools to establish an internal liaison and appoints Robert Kidwell as the liaison officer from SC 4 to ISO/PC 246.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 offers thanks to Dr. Gerry Radack, Leo van Ruijven, Rob Bodington, Howard Mason, and David Price who presented their material at the Open Technical Forum.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons and those projects who presented at the Liaison Plenary: * PDES, Inc -- George Sebes * NATO AC/135 -- Steve Arnett * ISO/TC 154 -- Ricardo Gonca...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to ECCMA -- Electronic Commerce Code Management Association for hosting and support of the 57th ISO TC 184/SC 4 Plenary meetings at the Tigh-Na-Mara Conference Centr...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
